documentation.description:
Send raw controller memory. The use of this message is discouraged for
normal packets, but a quite efficient way for testing new messages and
getting experimental debug output.

record_types.name: Memory_Vect

fields.name: Address
fields.description: Starting address of the debug variables

fields.name: Ver
fields.description:
Version code of the type variable. 0=unknown, type ignored and
assumed int16_t. 1=as below

fields.name: Type_Field
fields.description:
Type code of the memory variables. for ver = 1: 0=16 x int16_t, 1=16
x uint16_t, 2=16 x Q15, 3=16 x 1Q14

subprograms.name: Check_CRC
subprograms.code:
function Check_CRC
  (Connect : in out MAVLink.V1.Connection)
   return Boolean

documentation.description: Returns True if CRC is valid

subprograms.name: Check_CRC
subprograms.code:
function Check_CRC
  (Connect : in out MAVLink.V1.In_Connection)
   return Boolean

documentation.description: Returns True if CRC is valid

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description: Same as Above but does not check CRC

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description:
Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description: Same as Above but does not check CRC

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description:
Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.

subprograms.name: Encode
Encode

documentation.description: Put the message in the buffer ready for send
